ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user's account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user's account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's ID */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  "headline" TEXT /* User's headline or tagline */,
  "website" TEXT /* User's website or portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversations" (
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversation */,
  "user1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first user in the conversation */,
  "user2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second user in the conversation */,
  "last_message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last message sent in the conversation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the conversation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the conversation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_user2_id FOREIGN KEY ("user2_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversations_user1_id FOREIGN KEY ("user1_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation the message belongs to */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the message */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was sent */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was last updated */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the message has been read */,
  "is_delivered" INTEGER /* Whether the message has been delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_members" (
  "group_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group member */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the group (e.g., admin, member) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_messages" (
  "group_message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group message */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the message belongs to */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was sent */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was last updated */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the message has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_messages_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friendships" (
  "friendship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship */,
  "user1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first user in the friendship */,
  "user2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second user in the friendship */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the friendship (e.g., pending, accepted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the friendship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the friendship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friendship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_user1_id FOREIGN KEY ("user1_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendships_user2_id FOREIGN KEY ("user2_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friend_requests" (
  "friend_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friend request */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the friend request */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the friend request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the friend request (e.g., pending, accepted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the friend request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the friend request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friend_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friend_requests_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friend_requests_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocked_users" (
  "blocked_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blocked user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was blocked */,
  "blocked_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who blocked them */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the block was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the block was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blocked_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocked_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocked_users_blocked_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("blocked_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., friend request, message) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was last updated */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., user engagement, message trends) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytic was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analytic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_file_path FOREIGN KEY ("file_path") REFERENCES files ("file_path")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_images" (
  "group_image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group image */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the image was shared in */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was shared */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_images_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_images_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_files" (
  "group_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group file */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the file was shared in */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was shared */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_files_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_files_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_attachments" (
  "message_attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message attachment */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attachment was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attachment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_attachments_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_attachments_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES messages ("message_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_message_attachments" (
  "group_message_attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group message attachment */,
  "group_message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group message the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attachment was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attachment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_message_attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_message_attachments_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_message_attachments_group_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_message_id") REFERENCES group_messages ("group_message_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "typing_indicators" (
  "typing_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each typing indicator */,
  "conversation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversation the typing indicator belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "is_typing" INTEGER /* Whether the user is typing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the typing indicator was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the typing indicator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("typing_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_typing_indicators_conversation_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversation_id") REFERENCES conversations ("conversation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_typing_indicators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_typing_indicators" (
  "group_typing_indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group typing indicator */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the typing indicator belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "is_typing" INTEGER /* Whether the user is typing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the typing indicator was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the typing indicator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_typing_indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_typing_indicators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_typing_indicators_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "push_notifications" (
  "push_notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each push notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the push notification */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the push notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the push notification was sent */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the push notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("push_notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_push_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spam_reports" (
  "spam_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spam report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the spam */,
  "reported_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was reported for spam */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the spam report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the spam report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the spam report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spam_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spam_reports_reported_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("reported_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spam_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
